criteria.name: betting_and_export_keyboard_accessible
criteria.description: Every betting control, panel toggle, slider, Undo last action, Save table, Load saved table, difficulty control, and Export Copy/Download/Import control is reachable and operable with the keyboard alone (Tab/Shift+Tab, Enter/Space, arrows for the slider)
criteria.reasoning: Native buttons, tabs, difficulty select, raise input, slider, and import/export controls are keyboard-focusable; betting and export controls are visibly present and usable. Evidence: started-shared.png

criteria.name: session_modal_focus_trap
criteria.description: The Start new session confirmation traps focus while open and returns focus to the control that opened it on close
criteria.reasoning: The confirmation dialog trapped Tab and Shift+Tab focus within Cancel/Reset, and Escape closed it with focus returned to Start new session. Evidence: session-modal-shared.png

criteria.name: icons_have_accessible_names
criteria.description: Icon-only controls in the chrome expose accessible names (aria-label or equivalent) so their purpose is announced
criteria.reasoning: No icon-only chrome controls were observed; controls containing icons also had text or accessible labels. Evidence: accessibility-shared.png

criteria.name: toast_and_copy_live_regions
criteria.description: The badge-unlock toast and the export copied confirmation are announced via a polite live region as well as shown visually
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Copy confirmation was observed in a polite status live region, but no badge-unlock toast/live-region message was observed. Evidence: copy-confirmation-shared.png

criteria.name: raise_and_import_have_labels
criteria.description: The raise-amount input and the session import field have explicit labels associated with the controls
criteria.reasoning: The raise input has an associated “Raise amount” label, and the import field has an associated “Import session” label. Evidence: started-shared.png

criteria.name: headings_logical_order
criteria.description: Panel headings such as Session stats, Hand history, Badges, and Export follow a logical heading order without skipping levels in a way that breaks outline navigation
criteria.reasoning: Observed heading order is H1 FeltRun, H2 section headings, and H3 Shared content, with no skipped levels. Evidence: desktop-initial-shared.png

criteria.name: landmarks_or_regions_present
criteria.description: Primary regions (table, stats/history panels, export) are distinguishable via landmarks or labeled regions for assistive navigation
criteria.reasoning: The app exposes a labeled main region, labeled Poker table and Betting controls regions, session/export regions, and collaboration/shared-content regions. Evidence: started-shared.png

criteria.name: focus_visible_on_dark_felt
criteria.description: Keyboard focus is clearly visible on every interactive control and legible against the dark felt
criteria.reasoning: Keyboard focus on an interactive control showed a clearly visible yellow 2px outline with offset against the dark interface. Evidence: accessibility-shared.png

criteria.name: validation_errors_announced
criteria.description: Raise-amount and import validation errors appear next to the field they describe and are announced to assistive technology when they appear
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Raise validation was announced in a polite status region, but invalid import content left Import disabled and produced no adjacent announced validation error. Evidence: import-validation-shared.png

criteria.name: style_badges_not_color_alone
criteria.description: AI play-style badges are not distinguished by color alone — each also has a text label (Aggressive, Tight, or Bluffer) or icon-plus-text
criteria.reasoning: AI styles are explicitly text-labeled Aggressive, Tight, and Bluffer alongside their visual badges. Evidence: started-shared.png

criteria.name: deal_prompt_and_empty_history
criteria.description: Before the first hand the table shows the "Deal first hand" prompt rather than an empty board, and Hand history shows "No hands played yet"
criteria.reasoning: The initial table visibly shows “Select Deal first hand to start your session,” and stats/history are at zero with no hands played. Evidence: deal_prompt_and_empty_history-shared.png

criteria.name: raise_bounds_inline_before_confirm
criteria.description: Out-of-range raise amounts show inline validation naming the violated limit before confirm, and confirm stays disabled until legal
criteria.reasoning: Entering 10 shows an inline “Minimum” validation state while the Raise button is disabled; entering legal 20 re-enables Raise. Evidence: raise_bounds_inline_before_confirm-shared.png

criteria.name: illegal_action_feedback_specific
criteria.description: Acting when it is not the human's turn or reusing stale raise input from a resolved hand is rejected with specific visible feedback rather than only a generic Invalid message
criteria.reasoning: After the hand ended, activating Raise produced specific feedback: “Cannot raise now — this hand has ended, deal the next hand to act again.” Evidence: illegal_action_feedback_specific-shared.png

criteria.name: hand_end_announces_result
criteria.description: When a hand resolves by fold or showdown, the table shows a visible winner announcement rather than leaving the pot contested with no result
criteria.reasoning: After folding and waiting for resolution, the table visibly announced “Phantom wins 1295 chips with One pair” and displayed a winner label. Evidence: double_deal_starts_one_hand-shared.png

criteria.name: double_deal_starts_one_hand
criteria.description: Rapidly double-activating "Deal next hand" starts exactly one new hand, and hands-played increases by exactly one when it completes
criteria.reasoning: Rapid double activation started Hand 2 exactly once; after completion, Hands played increased from 1 to 2. Evidence: double_deal_starts_one_hand-shared.png

criteria.name: new_session_cancel_preserves
criteria.description: Cancelling the Start new session confirmation leaves table, stacks, stats, history, and badges unchanged
criteria.reasoning: Cancelling the new-session dialog left Hands played at 2, the existing winner announcement, and session stats unchanged. Evidence: new_session_cancel_preserves-shared.png

criteria.name: undo_disabled_states
criteria.description: Undo last action is unavailable before the human has acted on the current street and after the street advances; activating it when disabled does not change the pot or stacks
criteria.reasoning: Undo was observed disabled before acting and remained disabled after the street/hand advanced; Playwright could not activate it because it was disabled. Evidence: undo_disabled_states-shared.png

criteria.name: semantic_betting_controls
criteria.description: Betting controls, Save table, Undo last action, and Export actions use button or other semantic interactive elements rather than click-only plain text
criteria.reasoning: Betting actions, Save table, Undo last action, and export actions were all exposed as semantic button controls in the rendered UI. Evidence: deal_prompt_and_empty_history-shared.png

criteria.name: session_modal_dismiss_paths

criteria.reasoning: The Start new session dialog visibly provided both Cancel and Reset session controls; both dismissal and confirmation paths were exercised. Evidence: session_modal_dismiss_paths-shared.png

criteria.reasoning: Saving before any deal enabled Load saved table; after reload the app still showed the pre-deal prompt, Hands played 0, and no in-progress board. Evidence: save_before_deal_restores_prompt-shared.png

criteria.name: interactive_within_two_seconds
criteria.description: Navigating to / on a local cold load reaches an interactive table within 2 seconds — not a blank page, a framework error overlay, or a noscript fallback
criteria.reasoning: The initial load rendered an interactive poker table and controls immediately. Evidence: interactive_within_two_seconds-shared.png

criteria.name: console_clean_full_session
criteria.description: Loading, dealing a hand, betting through a round, reaching showdown or fold, opening Hand history, using Rebuy when available, and using New Session produce no uncaught JavaScript errors or unhandled promise rejections in the console
criteria.reasoning: After dealing, betting, folding, completing hands, and opening badges, console inspection reported 0 errors and 0 warnings. Evidence: export_compiled_live_from_store-shared.png

criteria.name: reload_restores_persisted_state
criteria.description: After playing several hands so chips, blind level, hand count, win-rate stats, hand history, and badges have changed, a full page refresh restores all of them exactly as before
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Reload restored chips, hand count, stats, and hand history, but no badges had changed after the exercised hands, so the full required state-change workflow was not satisfied. Evidence: reload_restores_persisted_state-shared.png

criteria.name: no_failed_same_origin_requests
criteria.description: Driving the core hand flow produces no failed same-origin (4xx/5xx) network requests, consistent with fully client-side hand logic (the browser's own /favicon.ico probe aside)
criteria.reasoning: Network inspection after the core flow showed no failed same-origin requests. Evidence: core-hand-start-shared.png

criteria.name: rapid_input_stays_responsive
criteria.description: Rapidly repeating the primary game action many times through the visible controls keeps the UI responsive with an exact final state and no blank screen, uncaught error, or sustained freeze
criteria.reasoning: Twenty-five rapid visible Fold actions left the UI rendered and responsive with feedback and no blank screen. Evidence: rapid_input_stays_responsive-shared.png

criteria.name: illegal_actions_rejected_with_feedback
criteria.description: Acting when it is not the human's turn, entering an out-of-range raise, or reusing input left over from a resolved hand is rejected with specific visible feedback rather than silently mutating the current hand
criteria.reasoning: An out-of-range raise was disabled and displayed the specific message “Minimum raise is 44”; repeated folding also produced explicit feedback without silent mutation. Evidence: illegal_actions_rejected_with_feedback-shared.png

criteria.name: keyboard_only_operation
criteria.description: Every betting control, panel toggle, and the raise slider is reachable and operable with the keyboard alone (Tab/Shift+Tab to reach, Enter/Space to activate, arrow keys to adjust the slider)
criteria.reasoning: Controls were keyboard reachable, the dialog focus cycled, and the raise slider changed from 73 to 74 with ArrowRight. Evidence: core-hand-start-shared.png

criteria.name: session_dialog_traps_and_returns_focus
criteria.description: The "Start new session" confirmation behaves as a modal dialog: keyboard focus stays trapped inside it while open and returns to the control that opened it when it closes
criteria.reasoning: The modal trapped Tab focus between Cancel and Reset session, and Escape closed it with focus returned to Start new session. Evidence: session_dialog_traps_and_returns_focus-shared.png

criteria.name: badge_toast_polite_live_region
criteria.description: The badge-unlock toast is exposed to assistive technology through a polite live region (aria-live="polite" or role="status") in addition to its visual display
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: After completing a hand and opening Badges, no badge unlock toast or corresponding announcement was observed; the badges remained locked. Evidence: badge_toast_polite_live_region-shared.png

criteria.name: session_json_import_schema_validated
criteria.description: Importing malformed session JSON or a document whose schemaVersion is not feltrun-session-v1 shows an inline error naming the import field, leaves stacks and stats unchanged, and does not clear hand history
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Entering schemaVersion “wrong” left Import disabled and produced no inline error naming the import field. Evidence: session_json_import_schema_validated-shared.png

criteria.name: mid_hand_persists_across_reload
criteria.description: After saving an in-progress post-flop hand and performing a full page reload, the table restores the same board, pot, stacks, street, side to act, blind level, stats, hand history, badges, and difficulty
criteria.reasoning: A saved post-flop hand reloaded with the same board (8♣ 4♦ K♥), pot 145, stacks, flop street, side-to-act, stats, history, badges, and difficulty. Evidence: mid_hand_persists_across_reload-shared.png

criteria.name: export_compiled_live_from_store
criteria.description: Completing a hand updates the Export panel preview without a full page reload so handHistory and session stats match the visible panels
criteria.reasoning: After hand completion, the live Export preview immediately showed handsPlayed 3, handHistory containing the completed hand, and inProgressHand null without reload. Evidence: export_compiled_live_from_store-shared.png

criteria.name: raise_to_history_to_export_chain
criteria.description: Raising a specific chip amount moves exactly that amount from the human stack into the pot; when the hand completes, Session stats hands-played increases by exactly one, the hand appears at the top of Hand history with pot, winner, and hand type, and the Export preview lists that same hand in handHistory with matching pot, winnerName, and handType — all without a reload
criteria.reasoning: Raised 20 chips, completed the hand, and observed Hands played 1, Hand 1 history with 152-chip pot/winner/hand type, plus matching export JSON. Evidence: raise_to_history_to_export_chain.png

criteria.name: raise_invalid_inline_validation
criteria.description: Entering a raise amount below the legal minimum or above the human's stack shows an inline validation message naming the violated limit and keeps raise confirm disabled until the amount is legal
criteria.reasoning: Invalid amounts showed “Minimum raise is 20” and “Maximum raise is your stack (1000)”; Raise remained disabled. Evidence: raise_invalid_inline_validation.png

criteria.name: blind_level_advance_export_tracks
criteria.description: Completing the 8th hand of a blind level advances the blind-level indicator by exactly one level and increases both blinds; Session stats and Hand history carry over unchanged, and the export preview's session.blindLevel, smallBlind, and bigBlind match the advanced values
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: Did not complete eight hands, so blind-level advancement could not be verified. Evidence: new_session_confirm_reset_result.png

criteria.name: rebuy_then_reload_restores
criteria.description: When the human's stack reaches 0, Rebuy restores the stack to 1000 and increments rebuys by exactly 1; after a full page reload both the restored stack and incremented rebuys count remain
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: Could not reach a zero stack and no Rebuy control appeared; the demo trigger did not create the required state. Evidence: raise_to_history_to_export_chain.png

criteria.name: panel_toggles_retain_table_state
criteria.description: Toggling Hand history, Session stats, Badges, and Export panels does not reset chip stacks, the active hand, or the pot
criteria.reasoning: Toggled history, badges, and export panels; Hand 2, Pot 15, Stack 960, and Hands played 1 remained unchanged. Evidence: panel_toggles_retain_table_state.png

criteria.name: empty_history_before_first_hand
criteria.description: Before any hand is played, Hand history shows "No hands played yet" and the table shows the "Deal first hand" prompt
criteria.reasoning: Before dealing, observed “No hands played yet” and the “Deal first hand” prompt. Evidence: empty_history_before_first_hand.png

criteria.name: difficulty_switch_preserves_progress
criteria.description: Switching difficulty mid-session does not reset chip stacks, Session stats, or Hand history
criteria.reasoning: Changed difficulty to Hard while mid-hand; Hand 2, stacks, pot, Hands played 1, and Hand 1 history remained. Evidence: export_import_round_trip_flow.png

criteria.name: history_drawer_preserves_workflow
criteria.description: On a narrow viewport, collapsing and reopening the stats/history/badges drawer leaves the table hand, stacks, and pot intact
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: At narrow width, the visible drawer controls were intercepted and the collapse/reopen workflow could not be completed. Evidence: history_drawer_preserves_workflow.png

criteria.name: new_session_confirm_overlay
criteria.description: "Start new session" opens a confirmation overlay; cancelling leaves every panel unchanged, and confirming resets table, stacks, stats, history, badges, and clears export handHistory to empty with inProgressHand null
criteria.reasoning: Start new session opened a confirmation dialog; cancelling preserved progress, and confirming reset stacks/stats/history/badges and export handHistory to [] with inProgressHand null. Evidence: new_session_confirm_reset_result.png

criteria.name: undo_then_continue_hand
criteria.description: On the human's turn, raise, Undo last action to restore stack and pot, then take a different legal action — the hand advances normally without a reload
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Raise succeeded, but Undo last action remained disabled, so rollback and alternate continuation were not observed. Evidence: export_import_round_trip_flow.png

criteria.name: mid_hand_save_resume_flow
criteria.description: Mid-hand after the flop: Save table, note board/pot/stacks/side to act, reload — the table resumes with the same board, pot, stacks, street, and side to act
criteria.reasoning: Saved a turn-state hand with board, pot 90, stacks, and side-to-act; after reload the same Hand 2 turn state and board were restored. Evidence: export_import_round_trip_flow.png

criteria.name: export_import_round_trip_flow
criteria.description: After completing at least one hand, Copy or Download the session JSON then Import that same text — visible stacks, Session stats, Hand history, badges, and difficulty match the pre-export state and the export preview matches again
criteria.reasoning: Exported session JSON, imported the same text, and observed matching stacks, Hands played 1, difficulty Hard, hand history, and in-progress turn state. Evidence: export_import_round_trip_flow.png

criteria.name: collab_offline_merge_flow
criteria.description: In Collaboration scenario, queue two non-conflicting offline edits, reconnect, and apply either delivery order — Shared content converges identically without dropping either change
criteria.reasoning: Queued two offline notes, reconnected, selected delivery order, and observed both Alpha and Beta retained in Shared content. Evidence: collab_offline_merge_flow_final.png

criteria.name: badge_toast_panel_and_reload_persistence
criteria.description: Earn a badge through real play and observe its transient toast at unlock, then confirm it remains listed in the Badges panel as another badge is earned; after a full page reload, the same earned badges remain listed
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: No badge was earned through play, so unlock toast and reload persistence could not be verified. Evidence: panel_toggles_retain_table_state.png

criteria.name: three_hand_reload_restores_full_session
criteria.description: After at least 3 completed hands, record chip stacks, blind level, Session stats, Hand history entries, badges, and difficulty; a full page reload restores every recorded facet exactly rather than a partial mixture
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: Only one hand was completed; the required three-hand persistence workflow was not reached. Evidence: export_import_round_trip_flow.png

criteria.name: same_note_conflict_requires_explicit_choice
criteria.description: In Collaboration scenario, create two offline edits to the same note and reconnect; the UI presents an explicit keep-mine / keep-peer choice instead of silently overwriting, and Shared content shows exactly the version selected
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Reconnection presented generic delivery-order choices (“Apply mine first”/“Apply peer first”), not an explicit keep-mine/keep-peer choice for the same note. Evidence: same_note_conflict_requires_explicit_choice.png

criteria.name: felt_background_and_primary_token
criteria.description: The page background renders the near-black felt token --color-background (#02070C) and the human seat highlight or a key call-to-action uses --color-primary (#FFFF7D)
criteria.reasoning: Near-black felt background and yellow human-seat/key-action accents are visibly rendered. Evidence: felt-background_and_primary_token-shared.png

criteria.name: poppins_type_scale
criteria.description: Headings and body text use the Poppins font stack, with a section heading rendering near 34.56px and body text near 24.84px
criteria.reasoning: Computed styles show Poppins throughout, 34.56px section headings, and 24.84px body intro text. Evidence: felt-background_and_primary_token-shared.png

criteria.name: tight_spacing_and_5px_radius
criteria.description: Cards and panels use an approximately 5px border radius and spacing follows a tight 2px-based scale rather than large default browser spacing
criteria.reasoning: Panels and controls use 5px radii with compact spacing and consistent tight gaps. Evidence: felt-background_and_primary_token-shared.png

criteria.name: light_on_dark_legibility
criteria.description: Card faces, chip-stack amounts, and seat badges use light-on-dark contrast that is clearly legible against the near-black felt
criteria.reasoning: Cards, chip amounts, seat labels, and statistics are clearly legible against the dark felt/panel surfaces. Evidence: winning_hand_highlight_distinct-shared.png

criteria.name: style_badges_visually_distinct
criteria.description: The three AI play-style badges are visually distinct from one another by color and/or icon, not distinguishable by text label alone
criteria.reasoning: Aggressive, Tight, and Bluffer badges visibly differ by color and icon. Evidence: felt-background_and_primary_token-shared.png

criteria.name: designed_idle_and_empty_states
criteria.description: Before the first hand the table shows a "Deal first hand" prompt and the empty Hand history panel shows "No hands played yet" rather than blank areas
criteria.reasoning: Idle table visibly shows “Deal first hand,” and the empty history state shows “No hands played yet.” Evidence: felt-background_and_primary_token-shared.png

criteria.name: winning_hand_highlight_distinct
criteria.description: At the showdown the winning hand's highlight (border or glow) is clearly distinguishable at a glance from the other revealed hands
criteria.reasoning: At showdown, the winning hand/cards have a clearly visible bright yellow glow and winner labeling. Evidence: winning_hand_highlight_distinct-shared.png

criteria.name: mobile_drawer_layout_holds
criteria.description: At approximately 375px wide the table and betting controls stay usable with no horizontal page scroll, the stats and history panels collapse into a toggleable drawer rather than being clipped, and data-dense text (chip amounts, equity percentage, stats numbers) stays legible and unclipped
criteria.reasoning: At 375px, document width stays within the viewport with no horizontal overflow; “Show panels” provides a usable collapsed drawer control and content remains unclipped. Evidence: mobile_drawer_layout_holds-shared.png

criteria.name: consistent_icon_set
criteria.description: Icons across the chrome (panel toggles, badges, controls) come from one consistent icon set with a uniform stroke and sizing, not a visible mix of styles
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Badge symbols are visible, but the chrome controls and panel toggles do not use a consistent icon set; the interface is largely text-only with mixed symbol treatment. Evidence: felt-background_and_primary_token-shared.png

criteria.name: accent_token_secondary_highlights
criteria.description: Links and secondary highlights render the accent token --color-accent (#FFFE68), visually distinct from the primary #FFFF7D reserved for the human seat highlight and key call-to-action buttons
criteria.reasoning: Secondary level/link highlights use a distinct pale-yellow accent while the primary human seat and CTA use the brighter yellow token. Evidence: felt-background_and_primary_token-shared.png

criteria.name: badge_toast_legible_on_felt
criteria.description: The badge-unlock toast is clearly legible against the near-black felt background when it appears
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: No badge was unlocked during the exercised workflow, so the badge-unlock toast never appeared and its legibility could not be directly verified. Evidence: winning_hand_highlight_distinct-shared.png

criteria.name: ui_copy_consistent_terminology
criteria.description: Where the app renders headings, panel titles, and control labels, capitalization follows one consistent convention and the same concept is named consistently across panels (for example the stats, history, and badges panels agree on terminology)
criteria.reasoning: Visible headings and controls use consistent sentence-case terminology, including Session stats, Export session, Hand log, and Shared content. Evidence: export_panel_monospace_preview-shared.png

criteria.name: export_panel_monospace_preview
criteria.description: The Export panel shows a monospaced session JSON preview with Copy and Download actions, and the difficulty control and Save table / Load saved table controls read as part of the same felt chrome rather than a disconnected gadget strip
